|      /---------\     |
|      (  Begin  )     |
|      \----+----/     |
|           |          |
|           v          |
|           ^          |
|     <  Valid?  >     |
|           +          |
|           |          |
|           v          |
|  +----------------+  |
|  |  Process Data  |  |
|  +--------+-------+  |
|           |          |
|           v          |
|    /------------\    |
|    |  Database  |    |
|    \------------/    |
|                      |
|                      |
+----------------------+
